ogTitle: Dampier Peninsula vs Dandanning: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dampier Peninsula and Dandanning.
heading: Dampier Peninsula vs Dandanning — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dampier Peninsula, Western Australia and Dandanning, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dampier Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Dandanning (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dampier Peninsula or Dandanning safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dampier Peninsula has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Dandanning scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dampier Peninsula scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Dandanning scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dampier Peninsula or Dandanning?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dampier Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
